name: Schwarzschild Infinity Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シュヴァルツシルト
desc: If you control no monsters, or your opponent controls a monster with 2000 or more ATK: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 8 LIGHT or DARK Dragon monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Schwarzschild Infinity Dragon", but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Schwarzschild Infinity Dragon" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Dragon Xyz Monsters.
mnst_eff: If you control no monsters, or your opponent controls a monster with 2000 or more ATK: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 8 LIGHT or DARK Dragon monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Schwarzschild Infinity Dragon", but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Schwarzschild Infinity Dragon" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Dragon Xyz Monsters.
eff: If you control no monsters, or your opponent controls a monster with 2000 or more ATK: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 8 LIGHT or DARK Dragon monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Schwarzschild Infinity Dragon", but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Schwarzschild Infinity Dragon" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Dragon Xyz Monsters.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
